_doc: Policy for the self-running audit-loop workflow (.claude/workflows/audit-loop.mjs). Edit freely; the workflow reads this fresh each round.
_severity_note: critical/high + anything the triage flags ambiguous are REPORT-ONLY (never auto-pushed). Only low/medium mechanical fixes are applied, and only if the FULL suite stays green (no NEW failures vs baseline).
_protected_note: The .ci-gate-rc.bak entry is NOT bookkeeping: while a gate runs it is a byte-identical copy of agent/runtime_config.json (secret-shaped fields included). It is gitignored too, but it is listed here because the loop is told '.planning/audit/* is safe to commit' — belt and braces on the one file in that directory that is operator state.
_ci_gate_note: AUTHORITATIVE green-gate. `test_cmd` runs against the operator's live runtime_config.json, which both MASKS CI-only failures and INTRODUCES operator-only artifacts — a green run there does NOT mean CI is green. `ci_test_cmd` reproduces CI's exact clean-stub config (CI=true, n_ctx=2048, same marker expression) and always restores the operator config. The FINAL gate before pushing MUST be ci_test_cmd: the CI-config failing set must be a SUBSET of ciBaselineFailures (no NEW failures) — do not push on the operator suite alone. It prints a machine-readable `CI_GATE_RESULT status=<STATUS> exit=<code> passed=<n> failed=<n> errors=<n>` line plus each `FAILED ...` node id. READ `status=` AND READ THE **LAST** SUCH LINE — `failed=0` alone is NOT green: a session-killing timeout, a collapsed collection, or a failed config restore can all print failed=0, and the restore line is emitted AFTER the normal one from the EXIT trap. Only `status=GREEN` on the last line (with exit 0) is a pass.
scoped_test_hint: For a scoped check, run only the test file(s) touched by the fix, e.g. `cd agent && ../.venv-test/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_X.py -q`. Run the FULL test_cmd once for a quick operator-config pass, then run ci_test_cmd once as the authoritative gate before pushing.
known_artifact_note: These fail ONLY under the operator's live runtime_config.json (litellm/meilisearch/discord enabled) and pass under CI/clean-config. VERIFY before adding to this list: a test that also fails in isolation or under ci_test_cmd is a REAL defect, not an artifact — do not silence it here. (test_durable_facts_injected_verbatim_into_system_head was wrongly listed here; it was a genuine durable-facts eviction bug, now fixed in context_manager.py — removed.)
notes: Standing constraints honored by the integrator: work on master directly, never commit protected_paths, keep per-aspect sigils, end commit messages with commit_trailer. Fixers are read-only except the single sequential integrator.
